title: alkanna prasinophylla
intro: Alkanna prasinophylla, also known as Balkan alkanet or mountain mallow, is a flowering plant species belonging to the borage family (Boraginaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been attributed to its anthraquinone and flavonoid content. The health benefits of Alkanna prasinophylla are said to include soothing digestive issues, reducing inflammation, and exhibiting potential antioxidant properties. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as infusions, tinctures, and creams, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential side effects.
